_note: GLM5 c=64 held-out eval window. gorgo-static deploys the hillclimb-learned parameters from the c=64 tuning window (policy_matrix_c64_tuning.json). gorgo-autotune and gorgo-hillclimb start from the same learned values and continue tuning on fresh data. Pair with manifest_glm5_apr1_midday.json (different time-of-day from tuning window). REPLACE hyperparameters below with values from the c=64 tuning run's gorgo-hillclimb learned params.

policies._note: REPLACE with learned params from c=64 tuning hillclimb. Values below are the tuning starters as a reasonable gorgo-static default before tuning completes.
policies.name: gorgo
policies.label: gorgo-static

policies._note: REPLACE with learned params from c=64 tuning hillclimb. rtt_weight=1.0 because fit mode produces physical s/token rates.
policies.name: gorgo
policies.label: gorgo-autotune

policies._note: REPLACE with learned params from c=64 tuning hillclimb.
policies.name: gorgo
policies.label: gorgo-hillclimb
